name: proxy-codebuddy
description: CodeBuddy Proxy — OpenAI-compatible reverse proxy for CodeBuddy (protocol direct, OAuth, account pool, admin).

scripts.check: node --check admin-shared.mjs && node --check direct-admin-page.mjs && node --check cursor-direct-gateway.mjs && node --check cursor-gateway.mjs && node --check provider-events.mjs && node --check codebuddy-provider.mjs && node --check codebuddy-account-pool.mjs && node --check codebuddy-oauth.mjs && node --check codebuddy-cli-daemon.mjs && node --check codebuddy-local-creds.mjs && node --check codebuddy-models.mjs && node --check direct-tool-bridge.mjs
